sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_1417_GF_TOP_SHEET, part number MSV-100012, submitted by 케이원코퍼레이션 to H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports customer approval of the part, including revision history, drawing/material sections, QC process plan, inspection controls, and packaging specification.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_1417_GF_TOP_SHEET and model/part number is MSV-100012.
Applicable models are G1417FW and G1417FWP.
Supplier approval dates and document dates are shown as 2025.03.12.
Material list identifies Polyolefin Foams EVJ63=1001W from 영보화학.
QC process chart covers mass production and includes receiving inspection, lamination, die cutting, cutting, inspection/packing, outgoing inspection, and shipment.
Packaging specification states H&abyz common application and box stacking limits.

concepts.name: Control Plan Category PVS
concepts.evidence: Control Plan Category, □ DVS, ■ PVS, □ PRS, □ SOP

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet.
The model or part number is MSV-100012.
The applicable models are G1417FW and G1417FWP.
The supplier or manufacturer is 케이원코퍼레이션.
The revision shown on the cover is 00.
The material list includes Polyolefin Foams EVJ63=1001W made by 영보화학.
The QC process chart is for mass production.
The control plan category is PVS.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category, □ DVS, ■ PVS, □ PRS, □ SOP

evidence.claim: Die cutting dimension 1 is controlled as CTQ at 433.4 ± 0.2 mm.
Die cutting dimension 2 is controlled as CTQ at 355.2 ± 0.2 mm.
Outgoing inspection uses AQL 0.65 once per lot.
Packaging specification applies commonly to H&abyz deliveries.
Packaging box stacking limits are medium box up to 3 boxes, small box up to 5 boxes, and flat box up to 7 boxes.
evidence.evidenceText: 중형 Box : 3Box 이하 적재 할것; 소형 Box : 5Box 이하 적재 할것; 플랫Box : 7Box 이하 적재 할것

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal indicates FDA, but the source text does not mention FDA or any regulatory authority or jurisdiction.
No external standards are explicitly identified in the source text.
Product signal is Unclassified in metadata, while the source text identifies product name, part number, and applicable models.
The source appears to be spreadsheet-derived text with many empty cells and some OCR or extraction artifacts, including misspellings such as Produst/Part and possible Korean typo 부작.
